_note: deployment-configured.yaml mounts hello-dcs-config AND references hello-dcs-secret (API_TOKEN secretKeyRef), so the secret must exist BEFORE the deploy or pods never start. The content teaches configmap and secret on separate pages; the smoke plan applies the secret early so the single deploy comes up. Deploys use envsubst for ${DCS_REGISTRY}.

steps.run: envsubst < ~/exercises/deployment-configured.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
oc rollout restart deployment/hello-dcs && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
